title: Echone 16x
description: A blue-themed PvP pack which includes some QoL features for PvP like shorter swords, transparent inventories and low fire. There's also an amazing skybox and some well-designed items and blocks.
body:
A blue-themed PvP pack which includes some QoL features for PvP like shorter swords, transparent inventories and low fire. There's also an amazing skybox and some well-designed items and blocks.

Have a look at some of the textures:

Some tools
![Some tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b67c7bca780cfb5799b2fd2bc7c7d9d1fe2d39b4.png)
![Some tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54aab1b7e58c2d4e1c4bf260981797956d0c50be.png)

The armor
![The armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4253098a7bea4e5ca8a2e809a81fdd5cc7e1ef25.png)

Ores
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e97cd02089b58556c6a62d1deeb1224b655a3d40_0.webp)

Sky ([Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [FabricSkyBoxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) required) and HUD
![Sky and HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffe2418688f57d7a4fa4d3f39dcda1a4e5252f76_0.webp)

Inventory
![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb34194e1faa2bbeb8fe16ac4d4f3e5682e4c063_0.webp)
